calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Unknown
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

marc D. Coopersmith, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Golden State Lumber, Inc., a California corporation also doing business as Sierra Point Lumber.
Jodi Wicks, credit manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Wing Shun Ma, Inc., a California corporation, Balanced Buildings, Inc., a California corporation or Wing Wo Ma also known as Mark Ma, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 19, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed April 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Golden State Lumber, Inc., a California corporation also doing business as Sierra Point Lumber, and against the Defaulted Defendants Wing Shun Ma, Inc., a California corporation, Balanced Buildings, Inc., a California corporation and Wing Wo Ma also known as Mark Ma, an individual, as follows:

As to Defendant Wing Shun Ma, Inc., a California corporation:
Damages/Principal - $22,140.04.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,985.20.
Attorney Fees - $2,250.00.
Costs - $480.00.
Total - $28,855.24.

As to Defendant Balanced Buildings, Inc., a California corporation:
Damages - $13,856.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,464.08.
Attorney Fees - $1,725.00.
Costs - $440.00.
Total - $18,485.11.

As to Defendant Wing Wo Ma also known as Mark Ma, an individual:
Damages - $35,996.07.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,448.28.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $620.00.
Total - $45,889.35.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Continued To Jul-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
